feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Profitability and Performance Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Profitability and Performance Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PaPM Cloud: Execution Activity for multiple Transfer Structures
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm looking for the proper way make Chain Executions for Transfer Structures.

Here's the steps that I took:

1. Populated manually multiple Model Tables via flat files

2. Created multiple Transfer Structures

3. Created multiple target (new ones) Model Tables that will receive the transformed data.

4. Created an Execution Activity for each Transfer Structure.

So, building this way works for me, but I wanted to upgrade my model to reduce the amount of clicks to Run all of these Execution Activities, exclusively in the Process Menu. I've tried some combination of Writers and Joins, but none of the functions seems to work for my purpose (example below that didn't work).

Something similar to this popped in my mind, so I would have to create only one Activity for the Join, but the Data Transferred by the TS functions got stored in the Join, stead of being written back on the target Model.

Any thoughts on how to merge these activities?

Also, any idea on how to merge Functions or Activities on general (instead of just Transfer Structures) will help me a lot!

For now, I'm using the sequence: multiple Joins -> single Writer -> single Join -> single Execution Activity, but this sequence does not work properly with all functions.


Thanks!! 🙂

entry.title: Process scheduler job ending in error- RemoteExecutorService returned an error
entry.content: In PAPM Cloud I'm getting error while triggering the job - Process scheduler job ending in error- RemoteExecutorService returned an error: Token validation failed. Could you please let me know what are the possibilities to resolve the issue.

entry.title: Cross Company Code Posting to ECC from PaPM Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can we do a cross-company code posting to ECC from PaPM Cloud via the RFA function FI-GL Items. We have established the RFC destination to ECC system. Can you please provide let us know the pre requisite and if possible some blog on how this can be done.

Thanks,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: How to load Master data elements in PaPM Cloud with volume of records around 1,00,000 records
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to load the master data in PaPM cloud for a field with 1,00,000 + records. But while loading, the system is getting hanged even with around 5000 records load at a time via Modeling area. Can you please suggest a way to load this huge amount of master data to the fields. (We know tagged query is an alternative but would not want to leverage it as we would need to apply the analytical privileges as well which gets disabled with tagged query usage).

Could you please suggest here.

Thanks,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: Visual Modeler SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
How do I use the SAP SCT graphical modeler to create advanced metrics?

I have seen that it is the same as the SAP PaPM graphical modeler but I can't find information on how it works.

The documentation on how to create advanced metrics doesn't help me much. Step-By-Step Description of Constructing Example Advanced Metric - Carbon Emission Intensity | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Python RFA Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've tried to use Python RFA in SAP PaPM Cloud, but this error message is received:

'RemoteExecutorService returned an error: Forbidden'

Please explain how to activate/enable this Remote Executor Service.

Best regards

Peter

entry.title: How to maintain a empty value in Master data for a field in PaPM Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please let us know as to how we could maintain a empty / blank value for any field in Master data section of PaPM as currently it throws error as attached here.

Thanks,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: Complex predicates in PaPM Cloud vs normal field mapping for predicates
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please let me know which approach is recommended for specifying predicates / join condition in the join in terms of performance as well. Is it via the simple field mapping in the rules or via the complex predicate of the rule to specify this join condition.

Below is the example Normal field mapping :

Complex Predicates :

 

Thanks,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: PaPM Cloud: How to calling HANA stored procedure inside a PaPM environment using Python RFA
entry.content:
Dear all,

as anyone tested succesfullly this kind of feature or founded documentation that explain it? If yes, how? If not, what alternative way?

Thank you.

Best regads.

Daniela C.

entry.title: PaPM Cloud: how reproduce on-premise run manager function selecting process functionality
entry.content:
Hi all!

As anyone find a way to reproduce the PaPM on-premise functionality in which, inside Modeling Environment, you can run a function and then select the ID process (which contains parameters and selection defined at Calculation Unit Level)

I'm talking about this table that appears when you are in the Modeling Environment, select a function to test, and then clic on Run button 

Here you select the Process ID and then click on Run. So a new browser table showing results appears.

Thank you!

Best regards.

Daniela C.

entry.title: Editable Query in PaPM Cloud not working on top of Model Table HANA function type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a new table in SAP_PAPM_ADMIN schema. Now I want to have a input-enabled query on top of this 'Model Table HANA' function type in my modelling to update or load the data. The option to active the query gets disabled.

I am getting the below message :

 

Please let us know how we can achieve this.

Thanks,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in schema SAP_PAPM' while activating a join
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have built a 'Model Table' on top of which I have built a join function type to aggregate the data. Upon activating this join function, we are facing a strange issue - 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in schema SAP_PAPM' . Below is the screenshot.

Please let us know as to how we could fix this issue.

Thank you,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: PaPM function doesn't get deployed at first, and only works after reloading the browser.
entry.content:
Hello Experts! I've been trying to find the solution to this problematic, and I would really appreciate any help that can be provided.

When executing PAPM transactions, they are successfully carried out, but the window does not automatically display. However, the action is indeed performed, and this issue occurs with all transactions. Then after reloading the browser where the query is made, upon executing the function again, the table appears, without any changes to the configuration. The issue is that reloading does not always work on the first attempt, which is bothersome and delays the process.

It is important to note that this issue does not occur in the quality environment, which has the same configuration as the production environment. There, the tables display correctly on the first attempt without the need to reload the browser (whether it's Chrome, Firefox, Edge, etc.). We've reviewed the entire Post-Installation Steps as per SAP request, and everything has been done according to the documentation.

entry.title: Dataload from AWS S3 bucket into PaPm on S/4HANA
entry.content:
Greetings:

We have PaPm as add-on on S/4HANA system. trying to read data from AWS S3 bucket, Facing some issue. Anyone tried this scenario? Do we need to have any additional middleware like temporary storage like HANA database or any SAP BTP service like Integration Suite?

Thanks in advance.

Vittal A.

entry.title: Determine the PA object number using a substitution
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We need to determine the PA object for a large number of G/L accounts and company codes in S/4HANA, and OKB9 is not the most practical option. The OKC9 substitution seems to be a viable alternative, we have found a possible solution through note 39635 - Info: finding the profitability segment using a substitution, but it refers to R/3 and not S/4HANA. Does anyone know of any updated notes or any logic using a user exit for OKC9?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: Can we install PaPM on-premise edition as an add-on on S/4 HANA Private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello PaPM Experts,

I had a query, can we install the papm (on-premise) edition as an add-on on top of S/4 HANA Private Cloud? One of our clients has S/4 HANA private cloud edition and wants to use the PaPM on-premise add-on.

As far as I know, PaPM on-premise can be installed on S/4 HANA, FPSL, FSDP, BW on HANA, BW/4 HANA but all the systems need to be on-premise systems and not hosted privately.

If PaPM (on-premise) edition cannot be installed on top of S/4 HANA private cloud and the client is not inclined for a PaPM Cloud edition, then what is the best proposed architecture for such requirement?

Thanks

Amogh

SAP Profitability and Performance Management

entry.title: How to perform looping in SAP PaPM cloud based on a condition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to traverse through PRHI table to find out the top most WBS Element for a given WBSE value. The logic is, for the given WBS check whether the 'UP' field WBSE value is blank in PRHI table, if not pick the UP field WBSE value and repeat the same.

The process ends when we find an entry with UP field blank and that will be our topmost node. We are not able to find a way to perform this iteration in PaPM. We had tried iterative view, but that couldn't suffice the requirement.

Could you please suggest a way on how we can perform this?

Regards,

Hanna

entry.title: Integration of SAP PAPM with SAP S/4HANA for Automated Master Data Retrieval?
entry.content: Ιs it possible to integrate SAP PAPM with SAP S/4HANA and automatically receive Ιs it possible to in

entry.title: Fill data in multiple reports by executing 1 function in process
entry.content:
Dear experts 

Currently, I have a process in PAPM consisting of four reports, each linked to a specific view function. Currently, I need to execute four separate functions (1 for each view function) within my process activities before I have results in all 4 reports. I'm interested in consolidating these four functions into a single activity execution. So I want to execute one step in the process, but I would still need to see data in the 4 different reports. Is there a function or workaround available to achieve this?

Best,

Nathan

entry.title: PaPM on-premise - Is there a Table which cointains the FID dependences?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I'm struggling with searching a table that shows "where used" dependences between functions. When you enter in a specific Environmend ID and version from modeling view, when you click on a function and then on "where used" button, it opens a pop up that show the list of the functions that used that function. Anyone knows in SE11 if there is a specific table that show this?

Thank you!
